briefdescription.para: This function is used to check the distribution chosen is valid.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
pointer to the distribution settings struct

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, double RefClkFreq, double SamplingRate)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_SetPLLConfig

briefdescription.para: This function used for configuring the internal PLL registers based on reference clock and sampling rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates ADC/DAC.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
Reference Clock Frequency MHz(50MHz - 1.2GHz)
Sampling Rate in MHz(0.5- 4 GHz)

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the clock settings.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates ADC/DAC.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
pointer to set the clock settings

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if no valid distribution found.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to start the distribution tiles.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
pointer to the distribution settings struct

briefdescription.para: This function is used to set the clock distribution.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
pointer to the distribution settings struct

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if could not set distribution.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the clock distribution.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
pointer to get the distribution settings

listitem.para: XRFDC_FAILURE if no valid distribution found.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates ADC/DAC.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
Pointer to return the clock source

briefdescription.para: This function gets PLL lock status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates ADC/DAC.
indicates Tile number (0-3).
Pointer to return the PLL lock status

briefdescription.para: This API is used to get the PLL Configurations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
represents ADC or DAC.
Valid values are 0-3.
pointer to the XRFdc_PLL_Settings structure to get the PLL configurations

memberdef.argsstring: (XRFdc *InstancePtr, u32 Type, u32 Tile_Id, u8 Source, double RefClkFreq, double SamplingRate)
memberdef.name: XRFdc_DynamicPLLConfig

briefdescription.para: This function used for dynamically switch between internal PLL and external clcok source and configuring the internal PLL.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XRfdc instance.
indicates ADC/DAC
indicates Tile number (0-3)
Clock source internal PLL or external clock source
Reference Clock Frequency in MHz(102.40625MHz - 1.2GHz)
Sampling Rate in MHz(0.1- 6.554GHz for DAC and 0.5/1.0 - 2.058/4.116GHz for ADC based on the device package).

simplesect.para: This API enables automatic selection of the VCO which will work in IP version 2.0.1 and above. Using older version of IP this API is not likely to work.
